summary: Comprehensive testing of List & Quote Catalog, Commercial Flow Correction, and related features. All 15 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: Admin sidebar has CRM & Sales Pipeline as first group, Settings Hub has Sales & Commission tab with assignment policy, List & Quote Catalog page fully functional with search, custom items, and customer details form.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/public/quote-requests correctly accepts items, custom_items, and customer data - returns ok:true with request_id
Quote approval (PATCH /api/admin/quotes-v2/{id}/status?status=approved) correctly auto-generates Invoice + Order with generated_invoice and generated_order in response
Generated Order has correct fields: current_status=pending_payment, payment_confirmed=false, fulfillment_locked=true, commission_triggered=false
AI Assistant /api/ai-assistant/chat accepts page and role parameters for context-awareness
AI Assistant /api/ai-assistant/quick-actions returns role-specific actions (admin, sales, customer, affiliate)
Admin sidebar correctly shows CRM & Sales Pipeline as first group after Dashboard
Settings Hub Sales & Commission tab exists under Pricing Policy section
List & Quote Catalog page at /catalog/quote renders with search, items list, custom items support, and customer details form
seed_data_creation: Test quotes and orders created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from this batch verified working: 1) POST /api/public/quote-requests creates requests linked to CRM + assignment engine, 2) Quote approval auto-generates Invoice + Order with correct pending_payment status and fulfillment_locked=true, 3) AI Assistant (Mr. Konekt) is context-aware with page/role parameters, 4) Admin sidebar has CRM & Sales Pipeline first, 5) Settings Hub has Sales Assignment Policy in Sales & Commission tab, 6) List & Quote Catalog page fully functional at /catalog/quote

backend_api_tests: Generated Order has correct status fields (pending_payment, fulfillment_locked=true) - PASSED
GET /api/admin/settings-hub returns sales assignment policy - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: Admin sidebar CRM & Sales Pipeline first group - VERIFIED
Settings Hub Sales & Commission tab present - VERIFIED
List & Quote Catalog page loads at /catalog/quote - VERIFIED
Add Custom Item button and form - VERIFIED
Customer details form (first_name, last_name, phone, email, company) - VERIFIED
Quote Request cart with item count - VERIFIED

public_quote_requests.details: Accepts items, custom_items, customer data. Returns ok:true, request_id, request_number

quote_approval_commercial_flow.details: Auto-generates Invoice + Order. Response includes generated_invoice and generated_order fields

order_pending_payment_status.details: Generated Order has current_status=pending_payment, payment_confirmed=false, fulfillment_locked=true, commission_triggered=false

ai_assistant_context_awareness.details: Chat accepts page and role parameters. Quick-actions returns role-specific suggestions

admin_sidebar_crm_first.details: CRM & Sales Pipeline is first group after Dashboard in admin sidebar

settings_hub_sales_assignment.details: Sales & Commission tab under Pricing Policy section contains assignment policy settings

list_quote_catalog_page.details: Page renders with search, items list, custom items form, customer details form, and submit button
